VAL-API-001.reason: issue(id) returns all required fields: id, identifier, title, description, state { name }, labels { nodes { name } }, assignee (null since unassigned). Response: {data:{issue:{id:'63e8c0c3-...', identifier:'INV-5', title:'qbasic-test-issue-for-queries', description:'Test issue created for validation', state:{name:'Backlog'}, labels:{nodes:[{name:'Feature'},{name:'task'}]}, assignee:null}}}

VAL-API-002.reason: issue(id: '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') returns {data:{issue:null}} without GraphQL errors array.

VAL-API-014.reason: teams(filter: { key: { eq: 'INV' } }) returns exactly one matching team: {nodes:[{id:'45f08f35-...', key:'INV', name:'Involute'}]}.

VAL-API-015.reason: teams(filter: { key: { eq: 'NONEXISTENT' } }) returns {nodes:[]} as expected.

VAL-API-016.reason: issue(id).team.states.nodes returns all 6 workflow states: Backlog, Ready, In Progress, In Review, Done, Canceled. Nested resolution path works correctly.

VAL-API-017.reason: teams { nodes { key name states { nodes { name } } } } returns both teams (APP and INV) with their states. INV has 6 states, APP has 0 states (empty nodes array).

VAL-API-018.reason: issueLabels(filter: { name: { eq: 'task' } }) returns exactly one label: {nodes:[{id:'29703ba3-...', name:'task'}]}.

VAL-API-019.reason: issueLabels(filter: { name: { eq: 'nonexistent' } }) returns {nodes:[]} as expected.

VAL-API-042.reason: issueLabels (no filter) returns all 10 labels: Bug, Feature, Improvement, agent-ready, blocked, epic, needs-clarification, spec, spec-orch, task. Count >= 10 satisfied.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: all 9 passed. Created test issue INV-5 (qbasic-test-issue-for-queries) with labels for query testing. All query patterns (single issue, not-found, team filter, team states, label filter, unfiltered labels) work correctly.
